## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New component / feature
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility improvement
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Chore / refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] Standalone component; `input()`/`output()` functions; signals & `computed()`; `OnPush`
- [ ] No `@HostBinding`/`@HostListener`, `ngClass`/`ngStyle`, or `mutate()`
- [ ] Public API exported from `projects/angular/src/public-api.ts` (if applicable)
- [ ] `ng test` passes; tests added/updated
- [ ] Verified in the demo app
- [ ] Accessibility verified (AXE, keyboard, WCAG 2.1 AA, light/dark/high-contrast)
- [ ] Conventional Commit message(s) used
